name: get-your-sht-together-how-to-stop-worrying-about-what-you-should-do-and-start-doing-what-matters
description: Sarah Knight's profane, practical guide to getting your life together — beating anxiety, procrastination, financial chaos, and career uncertainty with the No Zero Days method.
useCase: Get your mental health, time, money, career, and relationships under control with a no-nonsense, actionable framework.
knownRisks: Profane language may not suit all readers
Simplified advice — not a substitute for therapy
Some techniques may not work for all personality types
